failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Particulate formation or deposition in BPR valve
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter before BPR and schedule regular maintenance

failure_modes.cause: Increased viscosity or obstruction in reactor
failure_modes.mitigation: Monitor pressure drop and clean reactor periodically

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform particle size analysis on solvent to ensure no particulate formation
Conduct pressure drop tests across reactor at varying flow rates to ensure stability
